index.meta.pageTitle: BiDi — Smart RTL for the Modern Web
hero.sub: Smart text direction for Hebrew, Arabic & Persian. Auto-detects RTL content, remembers your preferences per site, and syncs across all your devices.
demo.title: See the difference
demo.sub: Hebrew and Arabic text on most websites is broken. BiDi fixes it instantly.
demo.annotationBefore: Text starts from the wrong side
features.title: Built for real-world RTL
features.sub: Three powerful capabilities that just work.
features.auto.title: Smart Auto Mode
features.auto.desc: Detects Hebrew, Arabic, and Persian characters in real-time. Only applies RTL direction to elements that actually contain RTL text — leaving everything else untouched.
features.persist.title: Per-Site Persistence
features.persist.desc: Set it once, forget it forever. Your preferred mode is saved per website and synced across all your Chrome instances via cloud storage.
features.zero.title: Zero Overhead
features.zero.desc: No dependencies. No performance hit. Built with pure browser APIs and a MutationObserver that activates only when needed. Your pages stay fast.
modes.title: Three modes, total control
modes.sub: Choose how BiDi handles each website.
modes.none.title: Off
modes.none.desc: Standard browser behavior. BiDi won't touch the page.
modes.auto.title: Auto Detect
modes.auto.desc: Scans each element for RTL characters and applies direction only where needed. Handles mixed content perfectly.
modes.rtl.title: Full RTL
modes.rtl.desc: Forces right-to-left on the entire page. Best for sites that are fully in Hebrew, Arabic, or Persian.
install.title: Get started in 30 seconds
install.sub: Available now on the Chrome Web Store.
install.step1.title: Open the Chrome Web Store
install.step2.title: Add it to Chrome
install.step2.desc: Click "Add to Chrome" on the store listing and confirm the install.
install.step3.title: Pin and start using it
install.step3.desc: Pin BiDi from the Chrome toolbar and choose the right mode for each site.
cta.title: Stop fighting with text direction.
cta.desc: BiDi is free, open-source, and built by someone who actually uses Hebrew daily.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overview.title: Overview
privacy.overview.desc: BiDi is a browser extension that fixes text direction (RTL/LTR) on websites for users of Hebrew, Arabic, Persian, and other right-to-left languages. This policy describes what data BiDi accesses, how it is used, and your rights.
privacy.overview.short: Short version: BiDi does not collect, transmit, or sell any personal data.
privacy.overview.stores: It stores only your text-direction preferences, locally in your browser.
privacy.data.title: Data Collected
privacy.data.desc: BiDi stores one thing: your per-site direction mode preference (None, Auto, or Full RTL).
privacy.data.whatStoredDesc$html: A mapping of website hostnames to a mode value (e.g., {"chat.openai.com": "auto"}).
privacy.data.whereStoredDesc$html: In Chrome's built-in chrome.storage.sync API. This syncs across your Chrome instances via your Google account, under Google's privacy policy.
privacy.data.whatNotDesc: Page content, browsing history, text you type, personally identifiable information of any kind.
privacy.transmission.title: Data Transmission
privacy.transmission.desc1: BiDi does not contact any external servers. It does not send any data to the extension developer or any third party. No analytics, no telemetry, no crash reporting.
privacy.transmission.desc2: The only network activity is the Chrome sync of your settings, which is handled entirely by Chrome and Google — not by BiDi.
privacy.permissions.title: Permissions Used
privacy.permissions.storage: Read and write your per-site direction settings.
privacy.permissions.tabs: Read the hostname of the current tab to display the correct setting in the popup. No tab content is accessed.
privacy.permissions.scripting: Inject the CSS direction rules into the page. Only direction-related styles are applied; no page content is read or transmitted.
privacy.permissions.urlsDesc: Required to apply direction settings on any website. The extension only reads the hostname, never the full page content.
privacy.thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
privacy.thirdParty.desc: BiDi extension itself uses no third-party services, SDKs, or analytics tools. However, this website uses Google Fonts to deliver consistent typography.
privacy.children.title: Children's Privacy
privacy.children.desc: BiDi does not collect any data from any user, including children.
privacy.changes.title: Changes to This Policy
privacy.changes.desc: If this policy changes, the updated version will be posted at this URL with a new effective date. Material changes will also be noted in the extension's version release notes on the Chrome Web Store.
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.contact.desc: Questions or concerns about this policy can be raised via the project's issue tracker:
